mapper.sql: select stk.id, stk.qty, stk.material_id, stk.material_name as snap_material_name, stk.material_speci as snap_material_speci, stk.material_model as snap_material_model, stk.material_factory_id as snap_material_factory_id, stk.warehouse_id, stk.unit_price,stk.amt, stk.batch_no, stk.batch_id, stk.batch_number, stk.material_no, stk.material_date, stk.warehouse_date, stk.supplier_id,stk.factory_id,stk.begin_time,stk.end_time,stk.receipt_order_no,stk.kc_no,stk.his_id,stk.third_party_batch_no,stk.tenant_id,stk.settlement_type, stk.main_barcode, stk.sub_barcode, stk.lv_inhospital_package_code, w.id wId,w.code warehouseCode,w.name warehouseName, m.id mId,m.code materialCode,m.name materialName, m.speci m_speci, m.model m_model, m.register_no m_registerNo, m.unit_id m_unitId, m.factory_id m_factoryId, m.supplier_id m_supplierId, m.is_use m_is_use, m.is_billing m_isBilling, m.period_date m_periodDate, m.package_speci m_packageSpeci, m.is_way m_isWay, m.his_charge_item_id, hci.item_code as his_charge_item_code, hci.item_name as his_charge_item_name, hci.spec_model as his_charge_item_speci, hci.unit as his_charge_item_unit, hci.price as his_charge_item_price, u.unit_id u_id, u.unit_code u_code, u.unit_name u_name, f.factory_id f_id, f.factory_code f_code, f.factory_name f_name, ms.id ms_id, ms.code ms_code, ms.name ms_name, s.id sId,s.code supplierCode,s.name supplierName, wc.warehouse_category_id wc_id, wc.warehouse_category_name wc_name, fc.finance_category_id fc_id, fc.finance_category_name fc_name, rk.create_time rk_create_time, rk.audit_date rk_audit_date, cu.nick_name rk_creater_nick, au.nick_name rk_audit_nick from stk_inventory stk left join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_supplier s on stk.supplier_id = s.id left join fd_material m on stk.material_id = m.id left join his_charge_item_mirror hci on hci.tenant_id = stk.tenant_id and hci.charge_item_id = m.his_charge_item_id and (hci.deleted_flag is null or hci.deleted_flag != 1) left join fd_unit u on m.unit_id = u.unit_id left join fd_factory f on f.factory_id = COALESCE(stk.factory_id, m.factory_id) left join fd_supplier ms on m.supplier_id = ms.id left join fd_warehouse_category wc on m.storeroom_id = wc.warehouse_category_id left join fd_finance_category fc on m.finance_category_id = fc.finance_category_id left join stk_io_bill rk on rk.bill_no = stk.receipt_order_no and rk.bill_type = 101 and (rk.del_flag = 0 or rk.del_flag is null) and rk.tenant_id = stk.tenant_id left join sys_user cu on rk.create_by = cu.user_id left join sys_user au on rk.audit_by = au.user_id
and (m.id is null or ((m.del_flag is null or m.del_flag != 1) and (m.is_use is null or m.is_use = '' or m.is_use != '2')))
and (m.id is null or (m.del_flag is null or m.del_flag != 1))
and (m.id is null or (m.del_flag is null or m.del_flag != 1))

select SUM(IFNULL(stk.qty,0)) totalQty,SUM(IFNULL(stk.qty,0) * IFNULL(stk.unit_price,0)) totalAmt from stk_inventory stk left join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_supplier s on stk.supplier_id = s.id left join fd_material m on stk.material_id = m.id
select stk.id,stk.material_id, m.id mId,m.code materialCode,m.name materialName from stk_inventory stk left join fd_material m on stk.material_id = m.id
mapper.select:
select
IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(s.name), ''), '未填写') as groupName
IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(f.factory_name), ''), '未填写') as groupName
IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(wc.warehouse_category_name), ''), '未填写') as groupName
IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(w.name), ''), '未填写') as groupName
, SUM(IFNULL(stk.qty, 0)) as qty, ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(stk.amt, IFNULL(stk.qty, 0) * IFNULL(stk.unit_price, 0))), 2) as amt from stk_inventory stk left join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_supplier s on stk.supplier_id = s.id left join fd_material m on stk.material_id = m.id left join fd_factory f on f.factory_id = COALESCE(stk.factory_id, m.factory_id) left join fd_warehouse_category wc on m.storeroom_id = wc.warehouse_category_id where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
and IFNULL(stk.qty, 0) > 0 and stk.material_id = #{materialId} and stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and DATE(stk.warehouse_date) >= #{beginDate} and DATE(stk.warehouse_date) <= #{endDate} and (m.name like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%') or m.code like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%') or m.referred_name like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%')) and stk.supplier_id = #{supplierId} and m.storeroom_id = #{warehouseCategoryId}
and m.finance_category_id in
#{fcId}
group by
IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(s.name), ''), '未填写')
IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(f.factory_name), ''), '未填写')
IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(wc.warehouse_category_name), ''), '未填写')
IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(w.name), ''), '未填写')
order by qty desc
mapper.insert:
insert into stk_inventory
qty, material_id, material_name, material_speci, material_model, material_factory_id, warehouse_id, unit_price, amt, batch_no, batch_id, material_no, material_date, warehouse_date, supplier_id, factory_id, begin_time, end_time, receipt_order_no, kc_no, batch_number, tenant_id, settlement_type, main_barcode, sub_barcode, lv_inhospital_package_code,
#{qty}, #{materialId}, #{snapMaterialName}, #{snapMaterialSpeci}, #{snapMaterialModel}, #{snapMaterialFactoryId}, #{warehouseId}, #{unitPrice}, #{amt}, #{batchNo}, #{batchId}, #{materialNo}, #{materialDate}, #{warehouseDate}, #{supplierId}, #{factoryId}, #{beginTime}, #{endTime}, #{receiptOrderNo}, #{kcNo}, #{batchNumber}, #{tenantId}, #{settlementType}, #{mainBarcode}, #{subBarcode}, #{lvInhospitalPackageCode},
mapper.delete: update stk_inventory set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}

update stk_inventory set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now() where tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select * from stk_inventory where batch_no = #{batchNo} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) order by id desc limit 1

select fn.id as id, IFNULL(m.code, '') as materialCode, IFNULL(m.name, '') as materialName, IFNULL(m.speci, '') as materialSpeci, IFNULL(m.model, '') as materialModel, IFNULL(u.unit_name, '') as unitName, ROUND(COALESCE(inv.qty_sum, 0), 0) as currentQty, fn.lower_limit as safetyStock, ROUND(IFNULL(inv.unit_price_avg, 0), 4) as unitPrice, ROUND(IFNULL(inv.amt_sum, 0), 2) as totalAmt, alert_line.begin_time as produceDate, alert_line.end_time as expiryDate, IFNULL(alert_line.batch_number, '') as batchNumber, IFNULL(alert_line.batch_no, '') as batchNo, IFNULL(f.factory_name, '') as factoryName, IFNULL(sup_agg.supplier_names_agg, '') as supplierName, IFNULL(w.name, '') as warehouseName, IFNULL(m.is_use, '') as materialIsUse, CASE WHEN COALESCE(inv.qty_sum, 0) < fn.lower_limit OR (fn.upper_limit > 0 AND COALESCE(inv.qty_sum, 0) > fn.upper_limit) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as alertStatus from wh_fixed_number fn inner join fd_material m on m.id = fn.material_id inner join fd_warehouse w on w.id = fn.warehouse_id left join fd_unit u on u.unit_id = m.unit_id left join fd_factory f on f.factory_id = m.factory_id left join ( select stk.material_id, stk.warehouse_id, SUM(IFNULL(stk.qty, 0)) as qty_sum, CASE WHEN SUM(IFNULL(stk.qty, 0)) <> 0 THEN SUM(IFNULL(stk.amt, IFNULL(stk.qty, 0) * IFNULL(stk.unit_price, 0))) / SUM(IFNULL(stk.qty, 0)) ELSE NULL END as unit_price_avg, SUM(IFNULL(stk.amt, IFNULL(stk.qty, 0) * IFNULL(stk.unit_price, 0))) as amt_sum from stk_inventory stk left join fd_material mx on stk.material_id = mx.id where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (mx.id is null or ((mx.del_flag is null or mx.del_flag != 1) and (mx.is_use is null or mx.is_use = '' or mx.is_use != '2'))) group by stk.material_id, stk.warehouse_id ) inv on inv.material_id = fn.material_id and inv.warehouse_id = fn.warehouse_id left join ( select stk.material_id, stk.warehouse_id, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT su.name ORDER BY su.name SEPARATOR '、') as supplier_names_agg from stk_inventory stk inner join fd_supplier su on su.id = stk.supplier_id and stk.supplier_id is not null where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and IFNULL(TRIM(su.name), '') != '' group by stk.material_id, stk.warehouse_id ) sup_agg on sup_agg.material_id = fn.material_id and sup_agg.warehouse_id = fn.warehouse_id left join ( select s.material_id, s.warehouse_id, MIN(s.id) as pick_id from stk_inventory s inner join ( select x.material_id, x.warehouse_id, MIN(x.end_time) as min_end from stk_inventory x left join fd_material mx2 on mx2.id = x.material_id where (x.del_flag = 0 or x.del_flag is null) and x.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and IFNULL(x.qty, 0) > 0 and x.end_time is not null and (mx2.id is null or ((mx2.del_flag is null or mx2.del_flag != 1) and (mx2.is_use is null or mx2.is_use = '' or mx2.is_use != '2'))) group by x.material_id, x.warehouse_id ) z on z.material_id = s.material_id and z.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id and z.min_end = s.end_time left join fd_material mx3 on mx3.id = s.material_id where (s.del_flag = 0 or s.del_flag is null) and s.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and IFNULL(s.qty, 0) > 0 and (mx3.id is null or ((mx3.del_flag is null or mx3.del_flag != 1) and (mx3.is_use is null or mx3.is_use = '' or mx3.is_use != '2'))) group by s.material_id, s.warehouse_id ) alert_line_pick on alert_line_pick.material_id = fn.material_id and alert_line_pick.warehouse_id = fn.warehouse_id left join stk_inventory alert_line on alert_line.id = alert_line_pick.pick_id where (fn.del_flag = 0 or fn.del_flag is null) and (fn.enable_status = '0' or fn.enable_status is null) and fn.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and fn.monitoring = '1'
and fn.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}
and (m.name like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%') or m.code like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%') or m.referred_name like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%'))
and m.is_use = #{materialIsUse}
and exists ( select 1 from stk_inventory sstk where sstk.material_id = fn.material_id and sstk.warehouse_id = fn.warehouse_id and sstk.supplier_id = #{supplierId} and (sstk.del_flag = 0 or sstk.del_flag is null) and sstk.tenant_id = #{tenantId} )
and (COALESCE(inv.qty_sum, 0) < fn.lower_limit or (fn.upper_limit > 0 and COALESCE(inv.qty_sum, 0) > fn.upper_limit))
and not (COALESCE(inv.qty_sum, 0) < fn.lower_limit or (fn.upper_limit > 0 and COALESCE(inv.qty_sum, 0) > fn.upper_limit))
order by CASE WHEN COALESCE(inv.qty_sum, 0) < fn.lower_limit OR (fn.upper_limit > 0 AND COALESCE(inv.qty_sum, 0) > fn.upper_limit) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END desc, m.code, w.name

select count(1) from wh_fixed_number fn inner join fd_material m on m.id = fn.material_id left join ( select stk.material_id, stk.warehouse_id, SUM(IFNULL(stk.qty, 0)) as qty_sum from stk_inventory stk left join fd_material mx on stk.material_id = mx.id where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (mx.id is null or ((mx.del_flag is null or mx.del_flag != 1) and (mx.is_use is null or mx.is_use = '' or mx.is_use != '2'))) group by stk.material_id, stk.warehouse_id ) inv on inv.material_id = fn.material_id and inv.warehouse_id = fn.warehouse_id where (fn.del_flag = 0 or fn.del_flag is null) and (fn.enable_status = '0' or fn.enable_status is null) and fn.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and fn.monitoring = '1'
and fn.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}
and (m.name like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%') or m.code like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%') or m.referred_name like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%'))
and m.is_use = #{materialIsUse}
and exists ( select 1 from stk_inventory sstk where sstk.material_id = fn.material_id and sstk.warehouse_id = fn.warehouse_id and sstk.supplier_id = #{supplierId} and (sstk.del_flag = 0 or sstk.del_flag is null) and sstk.tenant_id = #{tenantId} )
and (COALESCE(inv.qty_sum, 0) < fn.lower_limit or (fn.upper_limit > 0 and COALESCE(inv.qty_sum, 0) > fn.upper_limit))
and not (COALESCE(inv.qty_sum, 0) < fn.lower_limit or (fn.upper_limit > 0 and COALESCE(inv.qty_sum, 0) > fn.upper_limit))

select stk.material_id materialId, stk.warehouse_id warehouseId, w.code warehouseCode, w.name warehouseName, m.code materialCode, m.name materialName, m.speci materialSpeci, m.model materialModel, u.unit_name unitName, MAX(f.factory_name) factoryName, wc.warehouse_category_name warehouseCategoryName, fc.finance_category_name financeCategoryName, m.package_speci packageSpeci, m.register_no registerNo, m.is_way isWay, SUM(IFNULL(stk.qty, 0)) availableQty, CASE WHEN SUM(IFNULL(stk.qty, 0)) > 0 THEN SUM(IFNULL(stk.amt, IFNULL(stk.qty, 0) * IFNULL(stk.unit_price, 0))) / SUM(IFNULL(stk.qty, 0)) ELSE NULL END unitPrice, ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(stk.amt, IFNULL(stk.qty, 0) * IFNULL(stk.unit_price, 0))), 2) materialAmt from stk_inventory stk inner join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_material m on stk.material_id = m.id left join fd_unit u on u.unit_id = m.unit_id left join fd_factory f on f.factory_id = m.factory_id left join fd_warehouse_category wc on m.storeroom_id = wc.warehouse_category_id left join fd_finance_category fc on m.finance_category_id = fc.finance_category_id where stk.qty > 0 and (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (w.warehouse_type is null or w.warehouse_type not in ('高值', '设备'))
and stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and w.name like concat('%', #{warehouseName}, '%') and stk.material_id = #{materialId}
and ( m.name like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%') escape '\\' or m.code like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%') escape '\\' or m.referred_name like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%') escape '\\' or ifnull(m.use_name, '') like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%') escape '\\' or ifnull(m.brand, '') like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%') escape '\\' or ifnull(m.speci, '') like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%') escape '\\' or ifnull(m.model, '') like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%') escape '\\' )
and m.speci like concat('%', #{materialSpeci}, '%') escape '\\' and m.model like concat('%', #{materialModel}, '%') escape '\\'
and find_in_set(concat(stk.material_id, '__', stk.warehouse_id), #{excludeMaterialWarehousePairs}) = 0
GROUP BY stk.material_id, stk.warehouse_id, w.code, w.name, m.code, m.name, m.speci, m.model, u.unit_name, m.package_speci, m.register_no, m.is_way, wc.warehouse_category_name, fc.finance_category_name order by w.code, m.code

select IFNULL(m.code, '') as materialCode, IFNULL(m.name, '') as materialName, IFNULL(m.speci, '') as materialSpeci, IFNULL(m.model, '') as materialModel, IFNULL(stk.qty, 0) as qty, IFNULL(stk.unit_price, 0) as unitPrice, ROUND(IFNULL(stk.amt, IFNULL(stk.qty, 0) * IFNULL(stk.unit_price, 0)), 2) as amt, CASE WHEN stk.batch_number is not null and TRIM(stk.batch_number) != '' THEN TRIM(stk.batch_number) ELSE IFNULL(stk.material_no, '') END as batchNumber, stk.end_time as endTime, stk.begin_time as beginTime, IFNULL(f.factory_name, '') as factoryName, IFNULL(w.name, '') as warehouseName from stk_inventory stk left join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_material m on stk.material_id = m.id left join fd_factory f on f.factory_id = COALESCE(stk.factory_id, m.factory_id) where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and IFNULL(stk.qty, 0) > 0 and stk.end_time is not null
and DATEDIFF(stk.end_time, CURDATE()) >= 0 and DATEDIFF(stk.end_time, CURDATE()) <= 30 order by stk.end_time asc, stk.id asc limit 500

select count(1) from stk_inventory stk left join fd_material m on stk.material_id = m.id where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and IFNULL(stk.qty, 0) > 0 and stk.end_time is not null
and DATEDIFF(stk.end_time, CURDATE()) >= 0 and DATEDIFF(stk.end_time, CURDATE()) <= 30
